summary: Iteration 8: Tested Midwife Notes, Provider Marketplace, and Admin Panel features. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: UI components verified, tabs visible, but tab navigation via Playwright has known React Native Web click handling limitation.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating default content

integration_issues.flow: Tab navigation in React Native Web
integration_issues.issue: Clicking tab bar items via Playwright doesn't trigger navigation - same issue reported in iteration 7
integration_issues.note: Tabs are VISIBLE in navigation bar (verified: Dashboard, Clients, Visits, Births, Notes, Profile for Midwife). Manual testing required to verify navigation works.

action_items: None - All APIs working correctly. Frontend tab visibility confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin registration via API allows ADMIN role - consider restricting this in production
Marketplace endpoint returns properly structured providers data with user and profile fields
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2418 - fixed MongoDB ObjectId issue in admin content creation)

test_credentials.admin_note: Admin created dynamically via API during testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Midwife Notes, Marketplace, Admin Panel) APIs working correctly. Frontend tab bar shows all 6 tabs for Midwife including Notes. Known issue: Playwright cannot click React Native Web tabs - manual verification recommended. Admin can be created via POST /api/auth/register with role='ADMIN'.
